name: ME-16 | Freelancer — Project Updates + Invoice Automation

nodes.name: Schedule: Mon/Wed/Fri 9am
nodes.notes: Runs Mon, Wed, Fri to send project updates and check for overdue invoices.

nodes.name: Read Projects Sheet
nodes.notes: Sheet tab: Projects. Columns: Client_Name | Client_Email | Project_Name | Status | Progress_Pct | Deadline | Last_Update_Sent | Invoice_Amount | Invoice_Due_Date | Invoice_Status | Invoice_Reminder_Count | Notes

parameters.subject: =📊 {{ $json.project_name }} — Progress Update ({{ $json.progress_pct }}% complete)
parameters.message:
=

Project Update: {{ $json.project_name }} 📊

Hi {{ $json.client_name }}, here's your latest progress report:

📈 Progress: {{ $json.progress_pct }}%

Status: {{ $json.status }}

Deadline: {{ $json.deadline }}

✅ What's been done:

REPLACE_WITH_COMPLETED_TASKS_OR_USE_NOTES_FIELD

{{ $json.notes }}

🔜 What's next:

REPLACE_WITH_NEXT_STEPS

Have feedback or questions? Hit reply — I'm always happy to chat!

— REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_NAME | REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_WEBSITE

parameters.subject: =💰 Invoice reminder — {{ $json.project_name }} ({{ $json.days_overdue }} days overdue)
parameters.message:
=

{{ $json.invoice_reminder_count >= 2 ? '🚨 Final Invoice Notice' : '💰 Payment Reminder' }}

Hi {{ $json.client_name }},

{{ $json.invoice_reminder_count === 0 ? 'Just a friendly reminder that payment for' : $json.invoice_reminder_count === 1 ? 'I wanted to follow up again regarding the outstanding invoice for' : 'This is my final notice regarding the overdue invoice for' }} {{ $json.project_name }} is due.

💰 Amount due: {{ $json.invoice_amount }}

📅 Due date: {{ $json.invoice_due_date }}

⚠️ Days overdue: {{ $json.days_overdue }}

Pay Now →

Payment methods accepted: REPLACE_WITH_PAYMENT_METHODS. If you have any questions about this invoice, please reply to this email.

{{ $json.invoice_reminder_count >= 2 ? '

Please note: If payment is not received within 7 days, I may need to pause work on any current or future projects.

' : '' }}

— REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_NAME | REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_EMAIL

nodes.name: Webhook: Project Completed
nodes.notes: Trigger this webhook manually or from your project tool when a project is marked complete. Fields: client_email, project_name, client_name

parameters.subject: =🎉 {{ ($input.first().json.body || $input.first().json).project_name }} is complete!
parameters.message:
=

Project Complete! 🎉

Hi {{ ($input.first().json.body || $input.first().json).client_name }}, great news — {{ ($input.first().json.body || $input.first().json).project_name }} is officially wrapped up!

🗂️ What's being delivered:

REPLACE_WITH_DELIVERABLES_LIST

Access Your Files →

It's been a pleasure working with you. If you have any feedback or need any tweaks in the next 7 days, just hit reply.

And if you loved the work — a quick testimonial or referral would mean the world! 🙏

Leave a Testimonial

— REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_NAME

motionElevation.description: Mon/Wed/Fri: sends project progress emails and escalating invoice reminders (max 3). Separate webhook for project completion + delivery email.
